--- !bad_trailing_hint.sql
(a)-@x

--- Error
syntax error: testdata/input/gql_graph_pattern/!bad_trailing_hint.sql:1:5: expected token: <eof>, but: <param>
  1|  (a)-@x
   |      ^~


--- AST
&ast.BadGQLGraphPattern{
  BadNode: &ast.BadNode{
    NodeEnd: 6,
    Tokens:  []*token.Token{
      &token.Token{
        Kind: "(",
        Raw:  "(",
        End:  1,
      },
      &token.Token{
        Kind:     "<ident>",
        Raw:      "a",
        AsString: "a",
        Pos:      1,
        End:      2,
      },
      &token.Token{
        Kind: ")",
        Raw:  ")",
        Pos:  2,
        End:  3,
      },
      &token.Token{
        Kind: "-",
        Raw:  "-",
        Pos:  3,
        End:  4,
      },
      &token.Token{
        Kind:     "<param>",
        Raw:      "@x",
        AsString: "x",
        Pos:      4,
        End:      6,
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
(a)-@x
